hooks.command: bash -c 'COMMAND="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command"; if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qEi "push\s+(--force|-f)" ; then echo "BLOCKED: Force push is not allowed. Use regular push only." >&2; exit 1; fi; if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qEi "reset\s+--hard" ; then echo "BLOCKED: git reset --hard is not allowed. Use git stash or git checkout <file> instead." >&2; exit 1; fi; if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qEi "clean\s+-fd" ; then echo "BLOCKED: git clean -fd is not allowed. Remove files manually." >&2; exit 1; fi; if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qEi "rm\s+-rf\s+(\.|\./|/|HealthOS|supabase|docs|\.claude)" ; then echo "BLOCKED: Broad rm -rf on project directories is not allowed." >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qEi "\.(env|p8|pem|key|pfx)$"; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot write to credential file: $FILE" >&2; exit 1; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qEi "\.xcconfig$" && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qEi "\.xcconfig\.template$"; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot write to .xcconfig directly. Use .xcconfig.template instead." >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0'
